Stripe._comment: SEC-07: no keys committed. Dev supplies test keys via appsettings.Development.json or Stripe__SecretKey/__PublishableKey/__WebhookSecret env; Production fail-fasts at startup if unset (StripeConfiguration). Tests use FakePaymentService.

JwtSettings._comment: SEC-05/B-011: no signing secret committed. Dev/Test boot via a code fallback (JwtConfiguration.DevelopmentOnlyFallbackSecret); every other environment must supply a real JWT_SECRET (env) or JwtSettings:Secret, else the app fail-fasts at startup.

Authentication._comment: Google OIDC ID-token sign-in (AUTH-GOOGLE). ClientId is PUBLIC and served to the SPA via GET /api/auth/config; leave empty to ship the feature dark (button hidden, /api/auth/google rejects). The ID-token flow needs no client secret.

Seo._comment: B-044: canonical public origin for sitemap <loc>/robots.txt Sitemap line. REQUIRED (acceptance-blocking) for any non-Development/Testing deploy — Staging/Production fail closed (sitemap 503, robots omits Sitemap) when empty/invalid rather than emit canonical URLs from an untrusted host. Set Seo__SiteBaseUrl, e.g. https://www.climasite.com.
